title: AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN UNEXPENDED BALANCE APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6205 / 58 OG No. 17, 3525 (April 23, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3315, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN UNEXPENDED BALANCE APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Project Numbered Bp-272.6 for Ormoc City, page 208-A, Title B-Highways, Appendix 4 of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, is hereby amended to read as follows:

Ormoc-Albuera Road (N), Ormoc City

Asphal paving (90.0)(90.00)

Km. 110.00 Km. 118.00-8 kms. :S O B:â: : : : :

Yearly amortization 10 years, 4% :*9 1 7:â:(275.00):(55.11) : : : :

KM. 122-125-3 KMS. :S O B:â: (50.00):(50.00): : : : :

SEC. 2. Project Numbered Bp-272.10 for Ormoc City, page 208-A, Title B-Highways, Appendix A of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, is hereby amended to read as follows:

Ormoc-Kananga Road

Km. 106.08 Km. 106.29=20 Kms. :9 1 7: .4.00 : (4.00):(4.00) : : : : :

Km. 97:00 to Km. 104:00=7 Kms. :S O B::(100.00):(100.00) : : : : :

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
